description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular main structure and a single-story extension on one side. The exterior is clad in red brick with white-framed windows and doors, giving it a classic, urban residential appearance. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with several large, multi-pane windows on both floors. The roof of the main section is flat, while the extension also features a flat roof, possibly usable as a terrace or utility area. The main entryway is a simple white door located on the ground floor, with no porch or overhang, and is flanked by windows. The interior appears to be divided into multiple rooms, visible through the open roof and windows.
description: A two-story red brick house with white-framed windows, a flat roof, and a single-story side extension. The design is simple and urban, with symmetrical window placement and a plain entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large windows above, and the single-story extension to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extension's flat roof and a single window, with the main structure's windows visible above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide expanse of brick wall with three large windows and the extension on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main structure's symmetrical window arrangement and the extension set back.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple white door with no porch or overhang, flanked by windows
